title: Polymorphic Tom's Simple Storag
description: Polymorph support for Tom's Simple Storag.
body: An add-on mod providing [Polymorph](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polymorph) support for the Crafting Terminal and Pattern Encoding Terminal from [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/toms-storage-fabric), adding Polymorph's recipe selection button to these terminals in order to choose between conflicting crafting recipes instead of being forced to work with only one of these conflicting recipes within Tom's Simple Storage.
